{{Quote|It seems solid... But I feel it... In my mind...|Luke Skywalker|<ref name="SWA1TLH" />}}
'''Smoke Demons''' were a [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] manifestation that could be summoned through [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Sith sorcery/Legends|sorcery]]. They could [[Metamorphosis|metamorphose]] into their targets' worst fears and sought to vaporize their bodies. At some point following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[S'kytri]] [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] named [[Kharys]] used a Smoke Demon to murder the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Katya M'Buele]].

==Characteristics==
{{Quote|I've been scared before—I've faced death before, lots of time—but I've never felt anything like this.|Luke Skywalker|<ref name="SWA1TLH" />}}
A Smoke Demon, called ''Siqsa'' in [[Sith (language)|Sith]],<ref name="SLS">{{InsiderCite|134|Speak Like a Sith}}</ref> was an insubstantial manifestation of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] that assumed the form of its victim's worst fear upon being summoned by a [[Dark Jedi/Legends|dark-sider]]. They could be summoned through an ancient [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] ritual recorded as ''[[Dwomutsiqsa]]''—literally "Summon Demon"—in an ancient scroll recovered by [[Sorzus Syn]].<ref name="BOS">''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]''</ref>

The creatures could absorb their victim's body by flowing into it and vaporizing it, entrapping within them the victim's soul, which would be released upon the Demon's destruction.<ref name="BOS" /> They would first materialize as mere spirals of smoke before assuming a definite shape, then would paralyze their targets, leaving them conscious but helpless. Then the demon flowed into the body of its victim, who turned translucent, then transparent, and finally faded away. The entire body was turned to smoke and absorbed by the demon.<ref name="SWA1TLH" />

Despite being made of a smoky substance, a Smoke Demon apparently had significant strength, and was able to defeat a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] in [[Unarmed combat/Legends|hand to hand combat]]. It evidently did not have a capacity to speak orally, but instead communicated through some form of psychic ability, the extent of which is unknown.<ref name="SWA1TLH" />

==History==
{{Quote|That demon was a creation of the Force—given life by someone whose powers rival Darth Vader's.|Luke Skywalker|<ref name="SWA1TLH" />}}
Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], one such demon was used as an assassin by [[Kharys]], the violent ruler of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Skye/Legends|Skye]], due to its ability to move and kill silently. The [[S'kytri]] had learned the Dwomutsiqsa ritual under the tutelage of the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], following the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The demon summoned by Kharys eliminated the [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Katya M'Buele]] while she was sleeping aboard the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], with others standing guard. However, the demon was not able to escape, as he was impaled by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], which harmed the creature whereas [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolts did not. Skywalker was deeply affected by this encounter, and the young Jedi immediately recognized the mark of a powerful dark side user.<ref name="SWA1TLH" />
